Steps: 1. Access the inventory page. and verify UI elements corresponded design

Exactly 6 products should be displayed in a two-column list.
Image, Name, Description, Price, and "Add to cart" button must be present for each item.
Products should re-order correctly according to each selected criteria.

Should display QTY, Description, Non-editable quantity box, and "Remove" button.
